name: Prompt Engineering
description: Master the art of crafting effective prompts for AI models to get desired outputs and behaviors.

name: Agent Design Patterns
description: Learn architectural patterns for building autonomous AI agents that can complete complex tasks.

name: Large Language Models
description: Deep understanding of LLM architecture, training, and fine-tuning techniques.

name: Vector Databases
description: Master vector similarity search and embedding management for AI applications.

name: AI System Thinking
description: Develop holistic understanding of AI systems and their interactions with users and environments.

name: Tool Integration
description: Learn to integrate AI agents with external tools, APIs, and services for real-world applications.

name: Multi-modal AI
description: Work with text, image, audio, and video inputs in AI applications.

name: AI Safety & Ethics
description: Understand ethical considerations and safety measures in AI development and deployment.

name: LangChain Framework
description: Master the LangChain framework for building complex AI applications and workflows.

name: OpenAI API Mastery
description: Deep dive into OpenAI's API ecosystem including GPT models, embeddings, and fine-tuning.
